answer:
We can compute the regression slope \( b = \frac{n\sum XY - \sum X \sum Y}{n\sum X^2 - (\sum X)^2} \) and intercept \( a = \bar{Y} - b\bar{X} \), then the correlation \( r = \frac{n\sum XY - \sum X \sum Y}{\sqrt{[n\sum X^2 - (\sum X)^2][n\sum Y^2 - (\sum Y)^2]}} \).  

Using the given sums:  
\( b = \frac{31(23400) - (1860)(465)}{31(201600) - (1860)^2} = \frac{725400 - 864900}{6249600 - 3459600} = \frac{-139500}{2790000} = -0.05 \),  
\( \bar{X} = 1860/31 = 60 \), \( \bar{Y} = 465/
